center.name: 圣克鲁斯省 (阿根廷)
center.summary: 圣克鲁斯省 (阿根廷)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括Austral rail、白胁山蜂鸟、Chilean flicker等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The austral rail is patchily distributed in southern Chile's Magallanes Region and in southern Argentina between the departments of Río Negro and Santa Cruz

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The band-tailed earthcreeper is found in southwestern Argentina between Neuquén and Santa Cruz provinces and in the northeastern part of far southern Chile's Magallanes Region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Chilean flicker is found in central and southern Chile from the Coquimbo Region to central Magallanes Region and in adjacent southwestern Argentina between Neuquén and Santa Cruz provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in south-central Chile between the Atacama and Aysén regions and in adjacent western Argentina between Mendoza Province and Santa Cruz Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in western Argentina from Santa Cruz Province north to San Juan and in southern and central Chile from northern Magallanes to Valparaíso Region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The lesser shrike-tyrant is found from central Bolivia south through western Paraguay and Argentina to northern Santa Cruz Province. It has also been recorded as a vagrant in Brazil, Chile, and Uruguay. It inhabits open areas with scrubby bushes and scattered trees and in the north also agricultural areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies breeds in northern and central Chile from the Antofagasta Region south to the O'Higgins Region and in west-central Argentina from Mendoza Province south to Santa Cruz Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Patagonian canastero is found in southern Argentina from the provinces of Mendoza, La Pampa, and Buenos Aires south into northern Santa Cruz Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rusty-backed monjita is found in Argentina in an area roughly bounded by the provinces of Tucumán, Entre Ríos, and northeastern Santa Cruz.{{cite book | last =de la Peña | first =Martín R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also breeds in lesser numbers on the mainland in the southern part of Argentina's Santa Cruz Province and in southern Chile's Magallanes Region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: ruficaudus is found in western Argentina between San Juan and extreme northern Santa Cruz provinces and in adjoining Chile as far south as the Santiago Metropolitan Region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: minor is found in southern Chile from the O'Higgins Region south to Aysén and in adjoining southwestern Argentina from Neuquén Province to northwestern Santa Cruz

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: andinus is found in Chile from the Atacama Region south to the Los Lagos Region and separately in Argentina south to northern Santa Cruz Province. It has occurred as a vagrant in Peru and far northeastern Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-sided hillstar is found in the Andes from central Bolivia's Cochabamba Department south through Chile to the Biobío Region and Argentina as far south as Santa Cruz Province
